name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: I wouldn't run if there was someone else
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
Today, I complete my walk across New Hampshire. With the strife in America, I remain convinced that what my candidacy offers — someone who can bring together and reunite this nation — is what is most needed and most wanted by Americans. I saw it in every meeting, every encounter, every nod of the head, that the people I met are concerned, worried, bewildered about how divided we as a people have become.
They are great people, and they don't live their lives in bitterness or conflict, but they see a country tearing at its seams and they wonder who can ever repair it.
[**If I saw someone running who could, I would not have entered this race for President**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11038730/111916450/-601034299?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTUyMmZhMi01MWYzLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o_7yBNOmVWCp89RLYKowzI4-O6Z0EtoMlMrxjavQ808=&refcode=em102019p1).

I feel this so deeply because I know that [**integrity matters to Americans: service to country, to others above self, and accountability in answering for oneself**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11038732/111916452/-601034299?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTUyMmZhMi01MWYzLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o_7yBNOmVWCp89RLYKowzI4-O6Z0EtoMlMrxjavQ808=&refcode=em102019p2).

Very respectfully,
Joe

| | Hello Peter, #MoscowMitch McConnell has stonewalled almost every election reform proposal Democrats have sent to the Senate, including H.R. 1, the For the People Act, because he knows that protecting our elections and ensuring that the right to vote is secured only hurts the GOP. And nowhere is this clearer than what he's done to the Federal Election Commission (FEC) \-- the number of commissioners dropped to 3 at the end of August, bringing the nation's election regulatory body below the stipulated quorum of 4. They now cannot hold meetings, issue fines, or clarify rules that keep our elections as fair as possible. The door is wide open for campaigns to ignore finance regulations without any repercussions. If you believe that our country needs a fully functioning FEC and Democrats need to fight back against corrupt politicians like Mitch McConnell, we need your donation NOW. body:
This is a big moment!

Hi - I wanted to make sure you didn't miss this news:
_Susan Collins just launched her first TV ad._
This is a big moment - and we need to put up a big response. So what do you say?
[**Rush a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon 's campaign for U.S. Senate right away.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca2/4bef7a87/6b55bab5/287fd36c/3495605674/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191020-full")
Let's show Susan Collins what she's up against.
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager

From: Sara Gideon
Subject: Susan Collins just launched her first TV ad of this campaign.

[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca2/4bef7a87/6b55bab5/287fd363/3495605674/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-launch?refcode=em191020-full")

Big news -
**Susan Collins just launched her first TV ad!**
You know what that means? This race is heating up - and I need to know you're with me:
[**Make a $3 contribution to support our campaign today. Together, we will defeat Susan Collins and elect a Senator who puts Maine first.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca2/4bef7a87/6b55bab5/287fd36c/3495605674/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191020-full")
Control of the Senate is at stake, so Mitch McConnell and big Republican donors will spend whatever it takes to keep this seat for Collins. They'll try to use their money to stop our momentum.
I know this grassroots team won't sit back and let them do that. But how we respond today - in this moment - will determine how the rest of this campaign plays out. That's why I have to ask:
[**Chip in $3 now and let 's show Susan Collins, Mitch McConnell, and all her special interest donors that we are ready for this fight.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca2/4bef7a87/6b55bab5/287fd36c/3495605674/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191020-full")
Let's do this,
\- _Sara_

[**For the last decade, Michael has led the charge on banning members of Congress from ever becoming lobbyists to close the revolving door in Washington.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaeee/134673f2/a06f6fc/6997e78f/2471055262/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/pet-end-lobbying?source=EM_PET_B1_102019_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")

You don't go to Washington to get rich -- you go to serve the American people.

But corporate special interest groups have flooded Congress with dark money, allowing them to leave office and make millions.

[**That 's why Michael is running for president: He's got plans to clean up corruption in government - but he needs people like you to sign on in support of the plan.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaeee/134673f2/a06f6fc/6997e78f/2471055262/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/pet-end-lobbying?source=EM_PET_B1_102019_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Amazon workers deserve safety and benefits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Amazon publicly pledged to raise its minimum wage and working standards for its workers to the celebration of many, but a significant amount of their workers are hired through contractors \-- meaning that they aren't eligible for these new standards. The U.S. prides itself on our high expectations of working standards and workplace safety, but years of deregulation, lack of oversight, and big money in politics have left American workers unable to unionize, ask for living wages, or provide for their families. Democrats need to step up and defend our workers so that they too can live up to the American Dream. **[Please add your name if you agree that working in deplorable conditions is not okay and that Amazon workers deserve to earn enough money to make a living.](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddb9/6e9863e8/15b335ac/1db0f379/1038020900/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/amazondrivers/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")** Thank you for standing with workers, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddb9/6e9863e8/15b335ac/1db0f378/1038020900/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://www.paction.us/amazondrivers/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Roe v. Wade could be on the chopping block
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The GOP has long used _Roe v. Wade_ to rally the base and get out the vote with the promise of appointing Supreme Court justices who will overturn it. They have the justices with Trump-appointees Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh \-- and now they have the case to do it. The Supreme Court announced that it will be reviewing a Louisiana case involving a restrictive abortion law nearly identical to a Texas law the court struck down in 2016. This is the first major abortion case to reach the Supreme Court since Brett Kavanaugh was confirmed. If SCOTUS upholds the law, this ruling would radically reshape the landscape of reproductive rights in this country, allowing states to pass even more restrictive laws and shut down clinics. This would have dire \-- and deadly \-- consequences for people seeking their constitutionally-given right to an abortion and reproductive care. Public opinion has remained steady in support of abortion \-- according to a recent study, 54 percent support it being legal in most or all cases, holding nearly the same since 2014. Beyond abortion, 77 percent believe Medicaid and other government programs should cover birth control, despite the Trump administration's continuous efforts to defund these programs. This same study found that support for abortion amongst Democrats has only grown since 2014, rising from 67 percent to 70 percent. We're interested in seeing what you think: **Are you pro-choice?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdda1/6e9863e8/15ad59a4/1db0f341/3466717728/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/o2V3LHrH") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdda1/6e9863e8/15ad59a4/1db0f341/3466717728/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/o2V3LHrH") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdda1/6e9863e8/15ad59a4/1db0f340/3466717728/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191020c.ND-b&refcode2=meLNDUlg3zvPFFW5g1jQ")

name: Joe Sestak
subject: I just crossed New Hampshire. By foot.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Sunday was day 8, the final day of my walk across the Granite State — walking in the shoes of New Hampshirites. After walking over 90 miles in 7 days, yesterday's 8 mile stroll from North Hampton to Portsmouth felt easy like Sunday Morning.

First thing I did was visit the SEE Science Center to talk about spreading STEM education to the youth of America. Susan, the Executive Director, gave me a delightful tour. Her interactive science displays for young children were the most impressive I've seen. It is no wonder over 40,000 people come to visit every year!
After leaving Congress, I led FIRST Global, a nonprofit with the objective of promoting STEM education in the developing world through Olympics-style robotics competitions. Women were responsible for leading, organizing, or funding 60% of all nations' teams -- you can learn more about FIRST Global here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rBa2dXP7g9E](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11052962/112073365/-803653937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGI2ZDFjOS05ZmYzLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qgV282ObEMV0NUjJe4R5OBGN2rPm8Jgz83M7MRyEWIc=&emci=34f260b5-9cf3-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=44b6d1c9-9ff3-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798&v=rBa2dXP7g9E)
Next, I stopped by a local gun show. I believe in common sense gun reform. I know that not everyone agrees on this issue but, as President, I will go to gun shows and the NRA to bring about sensible gun reform, from an assault weapons ban to background checks. See my video at the gun show [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11052963/112073366/1206310102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGI2ZDFjOS05ZmYzLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qgV282ObEMV0NUjJe4R5OBGN2rPm8Jgz83M7MRyEWIc=&emci=34f260b5-9cf3-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=44b6d1c9-9ff3-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798&s=20).
Now nearing Portsmouth, I stumbled upon a wicked good yahd sale!
Upon arriving in Portsmouth shortly thereafter, I met with some local, national and international friends to discuss Climate Change. They included the chair of the Portsmouth Democrats, the manager of the gun show I attended, and visiting group of youth from China! This was especially welcome, because in order to address the defining challenges of our time, we must convene the world.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11052964/112073367/-1084476337?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGI2ZDFjOS05ZmYzLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qgV282ObEMV0NUjJe4R5OBGN2rPm8Jgz83M7MRyEWIc=&emci=34f260b5-9cf3-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=44b6d1c9-9ff3-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)
After the event, many of those who came finished the final half mile walk with me to the shore. Across the way was Portsmouth Naval Harbor, where I first left shore on a 31 year voyage with the United States Navy.

The past 8 days have been truly wonderful. I met fantastic people, and I learned about what inspires them in life. I also learned about the problems they face from day to day, and what they want from their presidential candidate.
A message of unity resonated here. It is a message that few other candidates bring to the table. I feel, the only way we can unite this country is to elect a President who is one of the people. Someone who is willing to walk in your shoes. I will be that President.
I'll continue to meet people in New Hampshire, Iowa and around the country. For my schedule for the coming days and weeks,** please check out our events page ([here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11052965/112073368/-1258320616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGI2ZDFjOS05ZmYzLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qgV282ObEMV0NUjJe4R5OBGN2rPm8Jgz83M7MRyEWIc=&emci=34f260b5-9cf3-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=44b6d1c9-9ff3-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798 "This external link will open in a new window")).**

Biofuels power Iowa's economy and are crucial to job growth in our state. President Trump must direct EPA to change course on SRE waivers. Hear (https://youtu.be/w1HB4hYMDUQ?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489) about my proposal.

https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489
https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWoK8_dK_O4JOjCtLkZKF9w?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489
https://richardsforcongress.com/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489

** Let's Talk about Iowa Energy
------------------------------------------------------------

Hi

My family was the first business to sell Gasohol in Shelby County on February 28, 1978. For over 40 years we have been supporters, consumers, and retailers (millions and millions of gallons of ethanol) of Iowa products. Since the Renewable Fuels Standard (https://www.epa.gov/renewable-fuel-standard-program/overview-renewable-fuel-standard?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489) was enacted in 2005, Iowans, including my family, have developed a prosperous biofuels industry. In a short time EPA Administrator Andrew Wheeler has wounded the industry. He has not followed the law as passed by Congress. His decision to sign waivers exempting the small refineries of the biggest companies in the world from meeting the requirements of the Renewable Fuels Standard has destroyed almost four billion gallons of ethanol and bio diesel.

On October 2, I said enough is enough (https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-enough-is-enough-time-for-trump-administration-to-step-up-for-iowa-farmers-ethanol-producers/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489) . On October 4, President Trump said he would fulfill his promise to our state. However, EPA Administrator Wheeler continues to ignore President Trump's intent. I'm not alone in thinking that we need to do something different. Look no further (http://agnewswire.com/2019/10/17/iowa-groups-outraged-over-epa-proposal/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489) than the Iowa Renewable Fuels Association, Biodiesel Board and Corn Growers to see how fired up Iowans in the 4th district are about protecting the ethanol industry. It is time we quit being "Iowa nice" in regards to the small refinery waivers and start acting more like Iowa neighbors do when they get cross. That is the type of energy I will bring to Congress in fighting for our state's renewable fuels industry.

But I can't fight for the ethanol and biodiesel industries without your support! Please consider donating $5 (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution-page/?mc_cid=18110a1fc9&mc_eid=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489) , $15 (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution-page/?mc_cid=18110a1fc9&mc_eid=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489) or even $25 (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution-page/?mc_cid=18110a1fc9&mc_eid=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489) to my campaign, as well as help spread my message throughout your community. Your generous donation can be made here. (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution-page/?mc_cid=18110a1fc9&mc_eid=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489)

Feel free to reach out to me at (712) 579-4753 or bret@richardsforcongress.com (https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=edc6b18449&e=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489) to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign team. I look forward to hearing from you!

I invite you to read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we'll accomplish together that are yet to come!

Your neighbor,
Building Our Network
This week I attended the Webster County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/webstercountygop?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489) Chili Supper in Fort Dodge and Hamilton County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/Hamilton-County-Republican-Central-Committee-193985027321468/?ref=br_rs&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489) Chili Supper in Webster City where I met hundreds of other Republicans gearing up for the red wave in 2020 and got the chance to listen to GOP leaders from across the state speak about conservative policy.
It was also great to be back on campus with the University of Iowa College Republicans (https://www.facebook.com/UIowaCrs/?fref=mentions&__xts__[0]=68.ARDT71gnYm7OVr4pQe3KkVbukN7EbxRqg9qENY1qG1qMI1lCv_M7i7cu5oh97UPZq4S9gzEaDJuz3IUaSd8WrvOj7GDDjqep_naV0Xa1q6sVuBeU10Vx3bLOsVvc-GfqF_Yt3sl0CPtqrbzjKPfAK0w9O5nVp3-l-ywTsdi9NF3R08E0gQAVC1IDuAW12QWaGyCKbE5SO807TBH9eLAOkgAEDbYp-gLrB3Hhx1TauvY4TxKh1duzsuJ1aFOX5jvTCSF6tBaCf2icrP2eIf8aQD4u8go1dF51VJNGyLywmO2ncgCA_G-Apvc2CAki2cnw1wwLZ_7ekwm-aN2dqz3sRk1KeBfx&__tn__=K-R&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489) , as well as the Buena Vista University College Republicans in Storm Lake. I am always glad to see a conservative presence challenging democratic narratives on liberal campuses. The future of the GOP is in excellent hands!

Recent Coverage

https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-visits-kdsn-in-denison/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489

https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-visits-kdsn-in-denison/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489
"In my family business of 300 people, we felt the hard part of Obamacare. It cost us $200,000 more in premiums and didn't provide the coverage that people needed. And as the board chair of a local hospital, I've seen the other side where doctors now say insurance companies dictate what they do."
Up Next

This week I'm headed to Humboldt to talk with an area Republican Women's group plus a few other events. We will be meeting with several old friends and some new ones too. Stay tuned for updates.

Get Involved
Donate $20.20 during the month of October and receive a campaign t-shirt as our gift to you! (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution-page/?mc_cid=18110a1fc9&mc_eid=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=17acf93db6-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_18_06_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-17acf93db6-25822489)

Addressing the climate crisis head on will be my priority in the senate. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771482/691c9bd/6fd8df7f/11a79498/1202411229/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

Donald Trump's "plan" to confront the climate crisis is a scam that lets big polluters off the hook.

But when Cory Gardner had the opportunity to take bold action and repeal it last week, he sided with these polluters instead of Colorado families.

His vote in favor of a rule that does nothing to limit carbon pollution and his refusal to hold dirty coal power accountable will very likely make this problem worse.

**Enough is enough. We are living through a crisis, team, and we can 't afford to waste another second with this kind of misguided action. [_If you agree that we need real leadership in the fight against climate change, please chip in whatever you can._](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191020_JH_20191020-fr-JH-carbon-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")**

The rule that Gardner just voted for extends the life of dirty coal plants, and it does nothing to set us up for a transition to cleaner, more renewable energy sources.

We desperately need more senators in Congress who will lead on this issue.

When I was Governor, we fought against climate change by enacting some of the strongest laws of any state in the country, and I promise you that addressing this crisis head on will be my priority in the Senate.
